faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Hackensack homes?
faqs.answer: Hackensack properties most commonly experience German cockroaches, American cockroaches, and Oriental cockroaches. German roaches are frequent in kitchens and bathrooms, while American and Oriental roaches often enter from basements, sewers, and drainage systems common in older Bergen County buildings.
